title: Al-Hasan b. al-Husayn al -Mus'abi 's revolt in Khurasan; various appointments to official positions
description: Al-Hasan b. al-Husayn al -Mus'abi 's revolt in Khurasan; various appointments to official positions. Recorded under the year 206 AH (c. 821 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
